_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

clinical_thresholds.note: or above in single sample based on endemicity (presumptive diagnosis)

preauth.label: Clinical notes detailing examination findings, investigations, Planned line of treatment
MAT (Microscopic Agglutination Test), PCR or IgM antibody test

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers and treatment details

ppd_preauth.q: Are all the sign and symptoms with vitals mentioned in the clinical notes?
Are the reports related to IgM or MAT test submitted?
Are the SGOT, SGPT, Sr. Bilirubin etc. submitted?
Are the LFT, KFT test reports submitted?
Does the MAT test, or IgM test report confirm the presence of leptospirosis?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details available?
Is discharge summary available with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: MAT test or IgM test report does not confirm the presence of leptospirosis
Clinical notes are missing or do not detail examination findings, investigations, or planned line of treatment
MAT (Microscopic Agglutination Test), PCR or IgM antibody test report is missing at pre-authorization
LFT or KFT reports are missing at pre-authorization
SGOT, SGPT, or Sr. Bilirubin reports are missing at pre-authorization
Detailed Indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details are not available at claim submission
Discharge summary is missing or does not include follow-up advice at the time of discharge
Signs and symptoms with vitals are not mentioned in the clinical notes

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MD / DNB/ equivalent (in General Medicine/Pediatric Medicine)
